DevOps Project

Home Features About

Welcome to My CI/CD Project

Automated deployment using GitHub Actions 🚀

Features

CI Pipeline

Automatically tests your code on every push.

CD Pipeline

Automatically deploys your website.

GitHub Actions

Automates everything from build to deploy.

About This Project

This is a simple DevOps learning project demonstrating CI/CD using GitHub Actions and automatic deployment to GitHub Pages.

Made for learning DevOps • Powered by GitHub Actions
